title: Water and lighting displays including unmanned aerial system
abstract: A water and lighting display that includes an unmanned aerial system (UAS) is disclosed. The UASs may illuminate water shot out of the water fountains, may fly in formation or may include removable payloads.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1 . A display, comprising: at least one water fountain shooting water; and at least one unmanned aerial system (UAS) that flies in proximity to the at least one water fountain. 2. The display of claim 1 , wherein the flight of the at least one UAS is synchronized with the water being shot out of at least one water fountain. 3. The display of claim 2, wherein the flight of the at least one UAS occurs under computer control. 4. The display of claim 1 , wherein the at least one UAS includes a light, and the at least one UAS shines light on the water. 5. The display of claim 1 , further comprising: multiple water fountains shooting water; and multiple UASs that fly in proximity to the multiple water fountains. 6. The display of claim 5, wherein at least some of the UASs include a light that is shined on at least some of the water fountains. 7. The display of claim 1 , wherein the at least one UAS includes a removable payload. 8. The display of claim 7, wherein the payload comprises a weight, light or pyrotechnic feature.
